fields.name: uicCode
fields.description: The railway UIC code defined by the worldwide railway organization, e.g. 7400001

fields.name: iataCode
fields.description: The airport code from IATA table codes, e.g. CDG

fields.name: localDateTime
fields.description: The date and time inspired from ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS) format
